⚠ Compliance Deadline

State & local government WCAG 2.1 AA compliance required as of April 2026. Healthcare Section 504 deadline: May 11, 2026.

Am I compliant? →

Home›Legal & Courts
Legal Translation & Court Interpretation

In legal proceedings, every word
has consequences.

ATA-certified legal document translation and court-certified interpretation for law firms, courts, immigration attorneys, and legal aid organizations. 300+ languages. Accepted by federal courts, state courts, and USCIS. Confidentiality guaranteed.

ATA CertifiedCourt CertifiedUSCIS AcceptedAttorney-Client Privilege
Order Legal Services → View Translation Services
300+Language pairs
24hrDocument turnaround
CourtAccepted certifications
NDAGuaranteed confidentiality
Legal services inquiry

Describe your case or matter. We respond within 2 hours with a quote and interpreter/translator credentials.

Confidentiality guaranteed · NDA available
Legal language services

Legal precision in every language.

Deposition & Court Interpretation

Court-certified interpreters for depositions, hearings, trials, and arbitrations. In-person and VRI available. Consecutive and simultaneous modes. Oath-administered, on record, and legally compliant.

Book Court Interpreter →

Legal Document Translation

Contracts, affidavits, court records, statutes, judgments, regulatory filings, and compliance documents. ATA-certified translators with legal field expertise — not general translators. Certified and court accepted.

Order Legal Translation →

Immigration & USCIS

Birth certificates, marriage certificates, passports, national ID documents, immigration petitions, and consular forms — certified and USCIS accepted. Attorney-client meeting interpretation available.

Order USCIS Translation →

Legal Transcription

Verbatim transcription of depositions, hearings, recorded interviews, and attorney dictation. Speaker-labeled, timestamped, and certified for legal use. 24–72 hour turnaround.

Order Legal Transcription →

Attorney-Client Meetings

OPI, VRI, or in-person interpretation for attorney consultations with LEP clients. Interpreters follow attorney-client privilege protocols and sign legal-specific confidentiality agreements.

Book Meeting Interpreter →

Legal Aid & Public Defenders

We offer volume pricing and expedited turnaround for legal aid organizations, public defender offices, and immigration legal services — the organizations where language access is most critical and resources are most constrained.

Request Volume Pricing →
Why legal professionals choose us

Legal translation is not general translation.
We assign legal specialists.

📚

Legal field expertise

Our legal translators hold law degrees or have documented expertise in legal systems of both the source and target language country. A contract translated for use in a U.S. proceeding requires understanding of both U.S. and foreign legal concepts.

🔒

Absolute confidentiality

Every interpreter and translator signs a legal-specific confidentiality agreement that covers attorney-client privilege, work product doctrine, and the specific matter. We can execute firm-specific NDAs as needed.

📋

Court-accepted credentials

Our certifications and interpreter credentials are accepted by federal district courts, state courts, immigration courts, USCIS, and most international arbitral forums. We provide credential documentation upon request.

Deposition scheduled? Document due? We turn legal around in 24 hours.

Court-certified interpretation confirmed within 2 hours. Certified document translation in 24–72 hours.

Submit Legal Request →Book Court Interpreter
